metadata.name: cloudimg
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v3 (LGPLv3)
metadata.summary: Services for building and releasing products in cloud environments

classes.name: cloudimg.common.PublishingMetadata
documentation:
A collection of metadata necessary for uploading and publishing a disk
image to a cloud provider.

Args:
    image_path (str): A file path or URL to the image
    image_name (str): The name of the image. Used as a primary identifier.
    snapshot_name (str): The name of the snapshot. Derived from the image
                         filename by default.
    description (str, optional): The description of the image
    container (str, optional): The name of the storage container for
                               uploads
    arch (str, optional): Ex. x86_64, i386
    virt_type (str, optional): Ex. hvm, paravirtual
    root_device_name (str, optional): Ex. /dev/sda1
    volume_type (str, optional): Ex. standard, gp2
    uefi_support (Bool, optional): Whether the image supports UEFI boot
    accounts (list, optional): Accounts which will have permission to use
                               the image
    groups (list, optional): Groups which will have permission to use the
                             image
    snapshot_account_ids (list, optional): Accounts which will have
                                        permission to create the snapshot
    tags (dict, optional): Tags to be applied to the image.

classes.name: cloudimg.common.DeleteMetadata
documentation:
A collection of metadata necessary for deleting a disk image and its
dependent objects from a cloud provider.

Args:
    image_id (str): The id of image. Used as a primary identifier.
    image_name (str, optional): The name of the image.
    snapshot_id (str, optional): The id f snaphost.
    snapshot_name (str, optional): The name of the snapshot.
    skip_snapshot (bool, optional): If true, deletion of snapshot is
                                    skipped. Default=False.

classes.name: cloudimg.common.BaseService

methods.name: cloudimg.common.BaseService.publish
documentation:
Upload a VM image into a cloud marketplace and make it available for
all required accounts/groups.

Args:
    metadata (PublishingMetadata): metadata for the VM image.
Returns:
    The published object depending on the cloud.

methods.name: cloudimg.common.BaseService.delete
documentation:
Delete a VM image from a cloud marketplace and
all its dependent objects.

Args:
    metadata (DeleteMetadata): metadata for the VM image.
Base class for all cloud provider services.

functions.name: cloudimg.ms_azure._get_values_from_connection_string
documentation:
Get all the values from the connection string.

Args:
    connection_string (str): The connection string of the
                             storage account

Returns:
    A dictionary with all the key-values in the connection string

functions.name: cloudimg.ms_azure._get_tags_filter_expression
documentation:
Create a filter expression from the given tags for search.

The filter expression is a string with format:
```
"tag1"='value1' and "tag2"='value2' ...
```

Args:
    tags (dict): Dictionary of strings with the tags to filter

Returns:
    String with the filter expression.

classes.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.BlobNotFoundError
documentation: Raised when a required Blob is missing.

classes.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.UploadProgress
documentation:
Responsible for storing the upload progress.

It's expected to be instantiated by a callback function during blob
upload phase.

Args:
    current (float): The current uploaded size in bytes
    total (float): The total size to upload in bytes
    percentage (float, optional): The upload progress percentage

classes.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzurePublishingMetadata
documentation:
A collection of metadata necessary for uploading and publishing a
Virtual Hard Disk (VHD) to Azure.

classes.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureDeleteMetadata
documentation: The required information to delete a blob on Azure.

classes.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.from_connection_string
documentation:
Factory for AzureService using the storage connection string for auth.

Args:
    connection_str (str): The storage connection string for auth.

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.from_storage_account
documentation:
Factory for AzureService using the storage account name and key
for auth.

Args:
    account_name (str): The storage account name.
    account_key (str): The storage account key.
Returns:
    AzureService object

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.get_container_by_name
documentation:
Retrieve a container with the given name.
If the container doesn't exist it will return `None` by default or
create it when the `create` parameter is set explicitly set to `True`.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the container to retrieve/create
    create (bool): Whether to create the container if it doesn't exist
Returns
    The requested ContainerClient if it exists

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.get_object_by_name
documentation:
Finds an object with a given name in a given container.

Args:
    container (str): The name of the container
    name (str): The name of the image

Returns:
    A BlobClient if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.filter_object_by_tags
documentation:
Check if a blob exists in any container from the given account.

Args:
    tags (dict): The tags to search for
Returns:
    FilteredBlob with the result or None when not found.

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.are_tags_present
documentation:
Check if a blob with the given tags already exists in the specific
container in the present storage account.

Args:
    container_client (ContainerClient): The container client to check
                                        the tags against of
    tags (dict): The tags to check for existence
Returns:
    True if the tags are present, False otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.upload_callback
documentation:
Callback for logging the upload progress.

Args:
    response (Dict[str, Any]): Dictionary with the upload progress
                               information.
Returns:
    UploadProgress object representing the upload progress.

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService._get_blob_copy_status
documentation:
Wait  and confirm till the copy of blob from url is completed.

Args:
    blob_client : Blob client which initiated the copy process.
Returns:
    Upload blob client on success
Raises:
    AzureError on upload failure.

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.upload_to_container
documentation:
Upload a blob to a container in a storage account and tag it.
If the file_url starts with http, use the upload_blob_from_url method,
otherwise use the upload_blob method.

Args:
    image_path (str): Local or remote path to the image
    container_name (str): The container to upload to
    object_name (str): The uploaded file name
    tags (dict): Tags to apply to the uploaded image
    **kwargs: Additional arguments for upload_blob and
              upload_blob_from_url

Returns:
    The uploaded BlobClient on success.
Raises:
    AzureError on upload failure.

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.publish
documentation:
Take some metadata about a VHD image and upload it to Azure.

This method relies on unique image/metadata names in order to do the
least amount of work possible.

If the incoming `metadata.image_name` is compressed as `.xz` its
content will be automatically decompressed before uploading.

Args:

: metadata (AzurePublishingMetadata): Metadata about the VHD image

Returns:

: The BlobProperties with the data from expected blob.

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.get_blob_sas_uri
documentation:
Get a SAS URL of a blob using its Storage account's connection string.
The SAS URL is with read-only permissions that will expire
in `self.SAS_EXPIRY` day(s).

Args:
    container_name (str): The blob's container name
    blob_props (BlobProperties): The uploaded blob properties
Returns:
    The blob's full SAS URI

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.tag_image
documentation:
Apply the corresponding tags to an uploaded blob
Args:
    blob_props (BlobProperties): The uploaded blob properties
    tags (dict): Dictionary with the tags to apply
Returns:
   Dictionary with updated properties

methods.name: cloudimg.ms_azure.AzureService.delete
documentation:
Delete VHD images for given metadata.

Args:
    metadata(AzureDeleteMetadata): Metadata about the image

Returns:
    tuple (image_name[Str], image_path[Str]) of removed objects.

Azure cloud provider service.
It's expected to be instantiated through one of its factories.

Args:
    blob_service_client (BlobServiceClient): The blob service client to
                                             manipulate the storage.
    storage_account_name (str): The storage account name for auth.
    storage_account_key (str): The storage account key for auth.

functions.name: cloudimg.aws.log_request_id
documentation:
The AWS request ID is useful when troubleshooting errors. When a
botocore.exceptions.ClientError error is raised, attempt to log the
request ID associated with the error.

https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/guide/error-handling.html#catching-exceptions-when-using-a-low-level-client

classes.name: cloudimg.aws.SnapshotError
documentation: Raised when a snapshot related error occurs.

classes.name: cloudimg.aws.SnapshotTimeout
documentation: Raised when a snapshot related timeout occurs.

classes.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSBootMode

class_variables.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSBootMode.uefi
documentation: Support UEFI only.

class_variables.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSBootMode.legacy
documentation: Support BIOS only.

class_variables.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSBootMode.hybrid
documentation: Support UEFI and BIOS giving the preference to UEFI.

class_variables.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSBootMode.not_set
documentation: Use the default boot mode from AWS.
The boot mode options supported by AWS when registering an AMI.

classes.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSPublishingMetadata
documentation:
A collection of metadata necessary for uploading and publishing a disk
image to AWS.

Args:
    ena_support (bool, optional): Enables enhanced network adapters. By
                                  default this option is enabled.
    sriov_net_support (str, optional): Set to 'simple' to enable enhanced
                                       network adapters for Intel 82599 VF
                                       interfaces. By default this option
                                       is enabled.
    billing_products (list, optional): Billing product identifiers

    boot_mode (str, optional): The boot mode for booting up the AMI on EC2.

    snapshot_tags (dict, optional): Tags to be applied to the snapshot
    import only.

    ami_tags (dict, optional): Tags to be applied to the registered AMI
    only.

classes.name: cloudimg.aws.UploadProgress

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.UploadProgress.determinate
documentation: Uploads are determinate if they have a total expected upload size.

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.UploadProgress.done
documentation: Only supported for determinate uploads.

Progress callback for file uploads. Can report determinate or indeterminate
progress. Expected to be called as a function.

Ex:
    callback = UploadProgress('mybucket', 'myfile', filepath='/some/file')
    callback(1024)
    callback(1024)
    callback(1024)
    ...

Args:
    container_name (str): Name of the container being uploaded to
    object_name (str): Name of the destination object
    filepath (str, optional): Path to the file being uploaded. None for
                              indeterminate progress.
    interval (int, optional): Seconds between logging updates

classes.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_image_by_filters
documentation:
Finds an image with the given filters.

Args:
    filters (list): List with the filters (dict) to apply.

Returns:
    An EC2 Image if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_image_from_ami_catalog
documentation:
Finds Image in AMI Catalog with given image id.
The search includes AMIs owned by self, AWS marketplace AMIs,
and Community AMIs.

Args:
    id(str): Image ID of AMI.

Returns:
    An EC2 Image if found; None other wise.

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_image_by_name
documentation:
Finds an image with a given name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the image

Returns:
    An EC2 Image if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_image_by_tags
documentation:
Finds an image with the given tags.

Args:
    tags (dict): The tags to filter the image

Returns:
    An EC2 Image if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_image_by_id
documentation:
Finds an image by image id.

Args:
    id (str): The id of the image

Returns:
    An EC2 Image if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_snapshot_by_name
documentation:
Finds a snapshot with a given name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the snapshot

Returns:
    An EC2 Snapshot if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_snapshot_by_id
documentation:
Finds a snapshot by snapshot id.

Args:
    snapshot_id (str): The id of the snapshot

Returns:
    An EC2 Snapshot if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_object_by_name
documentation:
Finds an object with a given name.

Args:
    container_name (str): The name of the container to search in
    name (str): The name of the object

Returns:
    An S3 Object if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.get_container_by_name
documentation:
Finds a container with a given name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the container

Returns:
    An S3 Bucket if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.create_container
documentation:
Creates a container with a given name

Args:
    name (str): The name of the container
    prop_delay (int, optional): Time to wait for propagation to occur

Returns:
    An S3 Bucket if found; None otherwise

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.upload_to_container
documentation:
Uploads an image to a storage container. If the image is a remote URL,
it will be streamed in chunks. If the file is a compressed .xz file
it will stream the decompression to the storage container.
Decompressing from a remote HTTP file is not supported.

Args:
    image_path (str): Local or remote HTTP path to the source image
    container_name (str): The container to upload to
    object_name (str): The uploaded file name
    chunk_size (int, optional): Size for HTTP stream chunks
    tags (dict, optional): Dictionary of keyword elements to be
    applied as tags on uploaded S3 image.

Returns:
    An S3 Object

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.publish
documentation:
Takes some metadata about a raw disk image, imports it into AWS and
makes it available to specific accounts/groups.

This method relies on unique image/metadata names in order to do the
least amount of work possible. For instance, if the raw disk image has
already been uploaded to storage but not yet imported as a snapshot,
the upload will be skipped.

Args:
    metadata (AWSPublishingMetadata): Metadata about the image

Returns:
    An EC2 Image

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.import_snapshot
documentation:
Imports a disk image as a snapshot.

Args:
    obj (Object): An S3 Object to import from
    snapshot_name (str): The name of the new snapshot
    tags (dict, optional): Dictionary of keyword elements to be
    applied as tags on imported snapshot.

Returns:
    An EC2 Snapshot

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.copy_ami
documentation:
Create copy of an AMI.

Args:
    image_id (str): AMI Id of the image to copy
    name (str): Name of new image
    region(str): Region for new Image.

Returns:
    Dict with Image_id of the newly created AMI and requests_id

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.wait_for_import_snapshot_task
documentation:
Waits for a snapshot import task to complete.

Args:
    task (dict): Import task details
    attempts (int, optional): Max number of times to poll
    interval (int, optional): Seconds between polling

Returns:
    An EC2 Snapshot

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.register_image
documentation:
Registers a snapshot as an image (AMI).

Args:
    snapshot (Snapshot): The EC2 Snapshot to register from
    metadata (AWSPublishingMetadata): Metadata about the image

Returns:
    An EC2 Image

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.share_image
documentation:
Shares an image with other user accounts or groups.

Args:
    image (Image): An EC2 Image
    accounts (list, optional): Names of accounts to share with
    groups (list, optional): Names of groups to share with

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.share_snapshot
documentation:
Shares a snapshot with other user accounts.

Args:
    snapshot (Snapshot): An EC2 Snapshot
    snapshot_name (str): Name given to the snapshot on creation
    accounts (list, optional): Names of accounts to share with

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.tag_s3_object
documentation:
Apply the corresponding tags to an existing S3 Object.

Args:
    container_name (str): the name of the S3 bucket
    object_name (str): the object name inside S3 bucket
    tags (dict): Dictionary with the tags to apply
Returns:
    dict with the versionId of the object the tag-set was added to.

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.tag_snapshot
documentation:
Apply the corresponding tags to a snapshot.

Args:
    snapshot (Snapshot): The snapshot to apply the tags
    tags (dict): Dictionary with the tags to apply
Returns:
    A list of tag resources

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.tag_image
documentation:
Apply the corresponding tags to an image

Args:
    image (Image): An EC2 Image
    tags (dict): Dictionary with the tags to apply

Returns:
    A list of tag resources

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.deregister_image
documentation:
Deregisters AMI image from AWS.

Args:
    image (Image): An EC2 Image

Returns:
    Id of deregistered image. (str)

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.delete_snapshot
documentation:
Deletes snapshot from AWS.

Args:
    snapshot (Snapshot): An EC2 Snapshot

Returns:
    Id of deleted snapshot. (str)

methods.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.delete
documentation:
Deletes AMI images and snapshot for given metadata.

If specified image is not found, we try to find snapshot
by other provided metadata.

Args:
    metadata (AWSDeleteMetadata): Metadata about the image

Returns:
    tuple (image_id[Str], snapshot_id[Str]]) of removed objects.

class_variables.name: cloudimg.aws.AWSService.CHUNK_SIZE
documentation: 4MB

AWS cloud provider service.

Args:
    access_id (str): AWS account access ID
    secret_key (str): AWS account secret access key
    region (str, optional): AWS region for compute operations
    import_role (str, optional): AWS IAM role for imports
